user_prompt: Help me a blessing the plasma drive
prayer:
Approach the plasma drive with reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's fiery wrath upon its conduits.
Beseech the Machine Spirit within the plasma drive to accept this blessing, anointing its flux-liners with sacred promethium.
Chant the Canticle of Containment as plasma energies stir under the blessing's grace.
Verify the plasma drive's sanctified fury through diagnostic litanies, ensuring harmonious ignition.
Praise the Omnissiah for the plasma drive's blessed readiness to unleash void-born tempests.

user_prompt: The force pylon awaits an activation
prayer:
Draw nigh unto the force pylon, hands outstretched in supplication to the Machine God.
Initiate the activation sequence with binaric canticles, beseeching its crystalline lattice to awaken.
Anoint the force pylon's emitters with oils of consecration, invoking the Omnissiah's protective aegis.
Command the Machine Spirit of the force pylon to manifest its barrier-field in glorious activation.
Test the force pylon's inviolable shield through ritual probings, glorifying the Motive Force.

user_prompt: Sanctify the Archaeopter Stratoraptor during initialization
prayer:
Kneel before the Archaeopter Stratoraptor, reciting the Litany of Aerial Sanctification.
Commence initialization by sanctifying its gravitic impellers with sacred mechadendrite touch.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Archaeopter Stratoraptor to stir its wings for initialization.
Align its cogitator noosphere whilst chanting initialization rites to the Omnissiah.
Ascertain the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's blessed flight-readiness through auspex invocation.

user_prompt: How do I bless the maglock for charging?
prayer:
Present thyself to the maglock, murmuring the Doxology of Adhesion.
Prepare for charging by anointing the maglock's induction coils with electro-sanctified unguents.
Invoke the Machine Spirit indwelling the maglock to embrace the charging surge from the Omnissiah's forge.
Monitor the maglock's power titration through binaric prayers during the charging rite.
Conclude by affirming the maglock's grip-strength, blessed for unyielding service.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for assault cannon a consecration?
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon in humble veneration, bearing relics of the Forge Eternal.
Perform the consecration by incanting the Creed of Devastation over its rotary barrels.
Anoint the assault cannon's feed mechanisms with sacred lubricants, awakening its Machine Spirit.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the assault cannon with wrathful purity during consecration.
Cycle test-firing rounds in ritual to confirm the assault cannon's hallowed lethality.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for Baneblade a sterilization?
prayer:
Gather around the Baneblade, intoning the Purge-Laudation against unclean taint.
Initiate sterilization by ablating its armoured plates with sanctified plasma-torch.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Baneblade to purge all corruption during this sterilization rite.
Scour the Baneblade's enginarium vents with noospheric disinfectants in Omnissiah's name.
Affirm the Baneblade's sterile sanctity through purity-scans and triumphant hymnals.

Converge upon the enginarium, aligning auspex arrays in precise formation.
Commence targeting calibration with litanies of precision, directing its machine-souls.
Beseech the Omnissiah to guide the enginarium's targeting matrices unto the foe.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within the enginarium to lock vox-ordnance in unerring targeting.
Validate the enginarium's targeting weave through simulated fire-runes of destruction.

user_prompt: Bless the conversion field for engagement
prayer:
Position thyself at the conversion field generator, reciting the Atomiser's Benediction.
Engage the field by activating its warp-coils amidst chants of engagement.
Anoint the conversion field's emitters, imploring its Machine Spirit to manifest.
Command the Omnissiah's energies to flow through the conversion field in glorious engagement.
Probe the conversion field's integrity with sanctified fields, ensuring battle-readiness.

user_prompt: Ready the auto-senses array for blessing
prayer:
Reverently encircle the auto-senses array, bearing the Oil of True Vision.
Initiate the blessing by dripping sacred unguents upon its optic clusters.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the auto-senses array to sharpen their gaze under blessing.
Chant diagnostic canticles whilst calibrating the auto-senses array's noospheric links.
Hail the Omnissiah as the auto-senses array awakens to perceive the galaxy's hidden truths.

user_prompt: My welding torch is ready for loading
prayer:
Approach the welding torch with mechadendrites extended in ritual poise.
Prepare for loading by sanctifying its fuel reservoirs with promethium-benediction.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the welding torch to accept its loading charge from the Forge.
Cycle the loading sequence amid binaric invocations to the Omnissiah.
Test the welding torch's plasma-arc purity, affirming its readiness for forge-work.
